parameters.jsCode:
const inp = $('Reassemble SRT').first().json;
const gh  = $input.first().json;
return [{json:{
  vimeo_id:          inp.vimeo_id,
  target_course_id:  inp.target_course_id,
  chapter_index:     inp.chapter_index,
  srt_file:          inp.fname,
  gh_path:           inp.gh_path,
  gh_url:            gh.content?.html_url || null,
  a7_status:         inp.a7_status,
  a7_score:          inp.a7_score,
  lip_sync_flags:    inp.lip_sync_flags?.length || 0,
  segments_count:    inp.segment_count || 0,
  tokens_used:       inp.tokens_used,
  status:            gh.content?.html_url ? 'DELIVERED' : 'ERROR',
  error:             inp.srt_error || null
}}];

const inp = $('Reassemble SRT').first().json;
const gh  = $input.first().json;
return [{json:{
  vimeo_id:          inp.vimeo_id,
  target_course_id:  inp.target_course_id,
  chapter_index:     inp.chapter_index,
  srt_file:          inp.fname,
  gh_path:           inp.gh_path,
  gh_url:            gh.content?.html_url || null,
  a7_status:         inp.a7_status,
  a7_score:          inp.a7_score,
  lip_sync_flags:    inp.lip_sync_flags?.length || 0,
  segments_count:    inp.segment_count || 0,
  tokens_used:       inp.tokens_used,
  status:            gh.content?.html_url ? 'DELIVERED' : 'ERROR',
  error:             inp.srt_error || null
}}];
